name: CoAP Unusual Method Execution
description: Detects unusual CoAP methods (PUT/DELETE) to IoT devices
query:
// CoAP Unusual Method Detection (NDR)
// PUT/DELETE methods on IoT devices
events from ndr_flow
where protocol = "coap"
  and method in ("PUT", "DELETE", "POST")
  and uri_path contains ("config", "admin", "update", "firmware")
group by source_ip, destination_ip, method
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
